description: Template for rates, liquidity, credibility, and cross-market stress events with central-bank or policy responses.

starter_sources.description: meeting statements, speeches, emergency facility announcements
yield curves, spreads, volatility, funding market and liquidity measures
financial stability reports, dealer commentary, market-functioning diagnostics

ingestion_priorities: fresh market data and policy announcements
historical episodes of repricing and policy stabilization
freshness_notes: Market data and policy communication decay very quickly. Historical shock analogs remain useful for identifying stabilization patterns but should not dominate current market conditions.
